videos.headline: Notre Dame Fighting Irish vs. Miami Hurricanes: Full Highlights
videos.description: Notre Dame Fighting Irish vs. Miami Hurricanes: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Notre Dame Fighting Irish vs. Miami Hurricanes: Full Highlights) 2025/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Miami's Justin Scott forces a fumble
videos.description: Justin Scott tackles Malachi Fields and forces a fumble to give Miami the ball back in Notre Dame territory.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Miami's Justin Scott forces a fumble) 2025/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Beck connects with Malachi Toney for a TD
videos.description: Carson Beck scores his first touchdown as Miami's quarterback with a great pass to Malachi Toney.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck connects with Malachi Toney for a TD) 2025/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Notre Dame's CJ Carr escapes multiple sacks, throws a TD
videos.description: CJ Carr escapes pressure from Miami defenders and throws a touchdown to a wide-open Micah Gilbert.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Notre Dame's CJ Carr escapes multiple sacks, throws a TD) 2025/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: CJ Daniels makes jaw-dropping 1-handed TD grab for Miami
videos.description: CJ Daniels goes full extension for a one-handed touchdown grab to put Miami up late in the first half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (CJ Daniels makes jaw-dropping 1-handed TD grab for Miami) 2025/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: CharMar Brown powers in for a 5-yard rushing TD
videos.description: CharMar Brown rushes up the middle, and the Miami offensive line pushes him into the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (CharMar Brown powers in for a 5-yard rushing TD) 2025/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: CJ Carr spots Jordan Faison for a Notre Dame TD
videos.description: CJ Carr pulls Notre Dame within seven with a 2-yard touchdown to Jordan Faison.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (CJ Carr spots Jordan Faison for a Notre Dame TD) 2025/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: You have to see this INT to believe it
videos.description: The ball gets bobbled in the air a few times before Rueben Bain Jr. comes up with an interception for Miami.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (You have to see this INT to believe it) 2025/08/31 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Noah Burnette kicks 39-yard field goal) 2025/08/31 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Carter Davis makes 38-yard field goal) 2025/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: CJ Carr is fired up after a 7-yard TD run
videos.description: CJ Carr keeps it himself and scores a 7-yard rushing touchdown to tie the score at 24.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (CJ Carr is fired up after a 7-yard TD run) 2025/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carter Davis drills a 47-yard FG to give Miami a late lead
videos.description: Carter Davis makes a 47-yard field goal to give Miami a 27-24 lead with 1:04 left in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carter Davis drills a 47-yard FG to give Miami a late lead) 2025/08/31 ESHEET
